body.title: T-task-chain: Task tool chaining pattern for design/build workers
body.result: Shipped via engram DSL 2026-04-19 audit. Task chaining in Igor = engram A's completion cell BRANCHIFs to engram B's node_id (or memory_id#trigger). Primitives delivered by GH-237 audit: cursor_runtime.py, node_executor.py (BRANCHIF/FORKIF/SPAWNIF/EMITIF). The biology-aligned answer to 'tool chaining pattern' is engram links, not a foreman loop. Separate follow-up T-retire-worker-foreman filed to migrate daemon-driven ticket pickup into a BOREDOM engram chain (the foreman is non-biomimetic scaffolding).
body.description: GitHub issue #285. Imported from GH audit — needs triage.
